mapper.select: SELECT id, service_id, push_enabled, push_url, push_secret, push_events, pull_enabled, max_retries, retry_interval, created_time, updated_time FROM cas_sync_strategy WHERE push_enabled = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cas_sync_strategy (service_id, push_enabled, push_url, push_secret, push_events, pull_enabled, max_retries, retry_interval) VALUES (#{serviceId}, #{pushEnabled}, #{pushUrl}, #{pushSecret}, #{pushEvents}, #{pullEnabled}, #{maxRetries}, #{retryInterval})
